title: DOH Workshop Protocol Parts 1, 2 and 3
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"filvv","text":"This collection of protocols details the extraction of high-molecular-weight DNA from Gram-negative bacterial culture, purification of dsDNA, removing contaminants and low molecular weight DNA, and creation of Nanopore sequencing libraries for the MinION flow cell.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
